zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich V von Nuremberg於1333年3月3日出生在德國時，他的父親John II Burgrave von Nuremberg23歲，母親Elizabeth Von Henneberg18歲。他於1356年與Elisabeth von Sachsen在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀可萊斯 魏瑪耶拿結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年1月21日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫爾巴賀庫爾巴賀普拉瑟波格享年64歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫費特萬根海爾布洛倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich V von Nuremberg于1333年3月3日出生在德国时，他的父亲John II Burgrave von Nuremberg23岁，母亲Elizabeth Von Henneberg18岁。他于1356年与Elisabeth von Sachsen在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀可萊斯 魏瑪耶拿结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年1月21日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 庫爾巴賀庫爾巴賀普拉瑟波格享年64岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫費特萬根海爾布洛倫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nuremberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nierenberg
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Nurembergin northern Bavaria, Yiddish name Nirnberg, German nameNürnberg, or from another place similarly named.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich V von Nuremberg was born on 3 March 1333, in Germany, his father, John II Burgrave von Nuremberg, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Von Henneberg, was 18. He married Elisabeth von Sachsen in 1356, in Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 21 January 1398, in Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 64, and was buried in Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich V von Nuremberg est né le 3 mars 1333, à Allemagne, son père, John II Burgrave von Nuremberg, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Von Henneberg, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Sachsen en 1356, à Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1398, à Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich V von Nuremberg am 3. März 1333 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John II Burgrave von Nuremberg 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Von Henneberg 18. Er hat 1356 in Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland Elisabeth von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1398 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich V von Nuremberg è nato il il 3 marzo 1333 nel Germania, il suo padre, John II Burgrave von Nuremberg, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Von Henneberg, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Sachsen nel 1356, nel Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1398, nel Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich V von Nurembergが1333年3月3日にドイツで生まれた時，父John II Burgrave von Nurembergは23歳，母Elizabeth Von Hennebergは18歳であった。1356年にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチクレイス ウエイマージェナでElisabeth von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年1月21日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス クルンバチクルンバチプラセンブルグで64歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチフエウチトワンジェンヘイルブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich V von Nuremberg(이)가 1333년 3월 3일 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John II Burgrave von Nuremberg(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Von Henneberg(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1356년 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 위마 제나에서 Elisabeth von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 1월 21일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿨바치 쿨바치 플래센버그에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 프우트왕 헤이브론에 묻혔다.

pt.3 March 1333–21 January 1398: 3 de março de 1333–21 de janeiro de 1398
pt.Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany: Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.Heilbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bavaria Ba: Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich V von Nuremberg nasceu em 3 de março de 1333, em Alemanha, seu pai, John II Burgrave von Nuremberg, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Von Henneberg, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Sachsen em 1356, em Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1398, em Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany: плассенбург, кулмбач, ландкрис кулмбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.Heilbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bavaria Ba: хилбронн, феучтванген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: джена, крис вимар, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich V von Nuremberg родился 3 марта 1333 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени John II Burgrave von Nuremberg было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Von Henneberg, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Sachsen в 1356 г. в местности джена, крис вимар, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 21 января 1398 г. в местности плассенбург, кулмбач, ландкрис кулмбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности хилбронн, феучтванген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich V von Nuremberg nació el 3 de marzo de 1333, en Alemania, su papá, John II Burgrave von Nuremberg, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Von Henneberg, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Sachsen en 1356, en Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1398, en Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania.
